final_prompt.prompt:
Instagram carousel slide, clean modern layout, white background,
professional furniture ecommerce aesthetic.

TOP TEXT (bold, dark charcoal, 28px, centered):
"Está cansado de pagar caro por fotos para seu ecommerce de móveis?"
SUBTEXT below it (medium weight, 22px, centered):
"Se liga na solução! Essa imagem aqui foi feita 100% com IA!"

CENTER IMAGE: ultra-realistic AI-generated product photo of a 
premium walnut wood armchair with cream bouclé fabric seat, 
pure white seamless background, three-point studio lighting, 
soft drop shadow underneath, sharp wood grain and fabric texture 
details, front angle with slight 15-degree rotation, commercial 
ecommerce catalog quality, photorealistic, 8K, Publicado en la plataforma de Amazon.，no watermark

BOTTOM TEXT (bold, with right arrow emoji →, centered, 22px):
"Passe para ver mais →"

Overall slide style: minimal, luxurious, high-end Brazilian 
furniture marketplace aesthetic, no clutter, lots of white space
